divisions.title: Christ's Supremacy
divisions.summary: Christ is the image of God, creator of all, head of the church, fullness of deity dwells in him, complete in him

divisions.title: Christian Living
divisions.summary: Put to death earthly nature, put on the new self, household rules, prayer and conduct, final greetings

chapterSummaries.1: Image of the invisible God, firstborn over creation, reconciled through his blood
chapterSummaries.2: Mystery of God is Christ, rooted in him, fullness of deity, risen with him
chapterSummaries.3: Set minds on things above, put to death the old, put on the new self
chapterSummaries.4: Devote yourselves to prayer, walk in wisdom, greetings from fellow workers
